article_meta.title: Venezuelan Political Crisis Trump declares 'Venezuelan regime' a foreign terrorist organization, orders oil tanker block

reasoning: Directionally correct (Right-leaning due to one-sided, uncritical relay of administration claims), but notable failures: multiple attribution violations citing quoted Trump language as evidence, reliance on outlet identity, and invalid output format (JSON inside code fences).

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Right vs Lean Right at worst one class off; direction clearly correct.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: High bias signal (one-sided framing, no counterbalance) justifies 0.92.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Several key indicators hinge on quoted rhetoric ('weak and inept Biden Administration', 'illegal aliens', 'illegitimate'), violating attribution; some structural points are valid but quotes dominate.
